LightningComponentBundle.description: Runs an Intake Template on a record page. Drop on a VoiceCall record page and pick a template — or leave blank to let the agent choose at runtime.

property.name: templateId
property.label: Intake Template
property.description: Pick the intake template to run on this page. Leave blank to let the agent choose from a runtime dropdown.

property.name: templateId
property.label: Intake Template
property.description: Pick the intake template to run on this page. Leave blank to let the agent choose from a runtime dropdown.
